channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KSB] KSB Files Annual Report for FY2025, Includes AGM Notice
item.description:
KSB Ltd has submitted its Annual Report for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, in compliance with Regulation 34 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The report comprises the Board’s Report, Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Statements, and the Auditor's Report. Additionally, the filing includes the Notice for the 66th Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for May 20, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. (IST) via Video Conferencing/Other Audio Visual Means. The Annual Report and AGM Notice have been disseminated to shareholders via email and a web-link, and are also available on the company's website.

  • KSB submitted its Annual Report for the financial year 2025.
  • Report includes audited standalone and consolidated financials.
  • Notice for 66th Annual General Meeting on May 20, 2026.
  • Documents are available on the company website for shareholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KSB Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [INFOBEAN] InfoBeans FY26 PAT Doubles to ₹87 Cr; Revenue up 32% to ₹539 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

InfoBeans Technologies announced exceptional financial performance for Q4 FY26 and the full year ended March 31, 2026. Full-year FY26 revenue grew 32% YoY to ₹539 Cr (24% in USD), with EBITDA rising 64% to ₹138 Cr. Profit After Tax (PAT) more than doubled to ₹87 Cr, a 128% YoY increase. Q4 FY26 was the company's best quarter, with revenue at ₹147 Cr (up 37% YoY) and PAT at ₹21 Cr (up 104% YoY), achieving a 15% PAT margin. The company also announced a total dividend of ₹1.00 per share for FY26, comprising a ₹0.50 normal dividend and a ₹0.50 special dividend. InfoBeans onboarded 24 new clients for the year, with 43% of revenue now from AI-augmented software development.

  • FY26 PAT more than doubled to ₹87 Cr, a 128% year-on-year increase.
  • Full-year FY26 revenue grew 32% YoY to ₹539 Cr.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue increased 37% YoY to ₹147 Cr, marking the best quarter.
  • Company declared a total dividend of ₹1.00 per share for FY26.
  • FY26 EBITDA rose 64% YoY to ₹138 Cr, reflecting strong operational efficiency.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Infobeans Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KPITTECH] KPIT Technologies Grants 21,000 Options Under RSU Plan 2022
item.description:
KPIT Technologies' Nomination and Remuneration (HR) Committee approved the grant of 21,000 options to eligible employees under the KPIT Technologies Limited - Restricted Stock Unit Plan 2022 (RSU Plan 2022) on April 28, 2026. The RSU Plan 2022 was previously approved by shareholders on August 24, 2022. Each option allows the employee to be issued one share at an exercise price of ₹10, which is the face value of the share. Options will vest after a minimum of 1 year and a maximum of 4 years from the grant date, and can be exercised within 5 years from the vesting date.

  • KPIT Technologies granted 21,000 options to eligible employees.
  • Options were granted under the RSU Plan 2022.
  • The exercise price is ₹10 per option, which is the face value.
  • Options will vest between 1 to 4 years from the grant date.
  • Vested options are exercisable within 5 years from vesting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KPIT Technologies Ltd | Category: ESOP

item.title: [EMBASSY] Embassy REIT Shares Audio Recording of Q4 & FY26 Earnings Call
item.description:
Embassy Office Parks REIT has provided a link to the audio recording of its earnings conference call. The call, held on Monday, April 27, 2026, at 1700 Hrs IST, discussed the company's financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is a continuation of a previous communication dated April 14, 2026, regarding the scheduling of the call.

  • Embassy REIT released the audio recording of its earnings conference call.
  • The call covered financial results for Q4 and the full year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The conference call took place on April 27, 2026.
  • The recording is accessible via a provided link.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Embassy Office Parks REIT | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TREL] Transindia Real Estate acquires 100% stake in 3 companies
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Transindia Real Estate Ltd has executed Share Purchase Agreements to acquire 100% equity share capital of Dighanta Landscape Private Limited, Panchghara Landscape Private Limited, and Panchghara Logistics Parks Private Limited. Panchghara Landscape Private Limited is already a wholly-owned subsidiary, with the others to follow upon share transfer. The target companies are engaged in real estate, land trading, and developing logistics parks. This cash consideration acquisition aims to consolidate business operations, enhance market presence, achieve operational synergies, and improve efficiency and profitability, especially with the aggregation of approximately 44 acres of land in Kolkata.

  • Transindia Real Estate acquires 100% equity in three real estate and logistics companies.
  • Acquisition includes Dighanta Landscape, Panchghara Landscape, and Panchghara Logistics Parks.
  • Panchghara Landscape is now a wholly-owned subsidiary of Transindia Real Estate.
  • The deal is for cash consideration and is not a related party transaction.
  • Aims to consolidate business, enhance market presence, and boost profitability.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Transindia Real Estate Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [CESC] CESC Board to meet on May 6, 2026, for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
CESC Ltd. has informed the BSE that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The main purpose of this meeting is to consider, approve, and take on record the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 29 and other applicable provisions of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 and full financial year 2026 results.
  • Results will be standalone and consolidated.
  • Announcement made as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CESC LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RPOWER] Reliance Power: 21.82 Cr Warrants Lapsed Due to Non-Conversion
item.description:
Reliance Power Ltd has announced that 21.82 crore outstanding warrants, previously issued by the company, have lapsed. This occurred because the warrant holders failed to convert them into equity shares within the stipulated 18-month period. Consequently, the amount initially paid on these warrants has also been forfeited. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations, 2015, and related SEBI Circulars. The lapsing of these warrants prevents potential equity dilution that would have occurred upon their conversion.

  • 21.82 crore Reliance Power warrants lapsed.
  • Warrants were not converted within 18 months.
  • Amount paid on lapsed warrants also forfeited.
  • Prevents potential equity dilution for shareholders.
  • Update aligns with Listing Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE POWER LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [ROADSTAR] RIIT's ICRA A (Stable) Issuer Rating Revalidated
item.description:
Roadstar Infra Investment Trust (RIIT) announced that ICRA Limited has revalidated its Issuer Rating as [ICRA]A (Stable). This confirmation was communicated via a letter from ICRA dated April 27, 2026, in response to RIIT's request. The rating, which was originally assigned on May 29, 2025, continues to stand valid. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and relevant SEBI circulars. The revalidation letter is enclosed for reference, and the information is also available on the Trust's website.

  • ICRA revalidated RIIT's Issuer Rating as [ICRA]A (Stable).
  • The rating, originally from May 2025, remains valid.
  • This confirms the Trust's creditworthiness.
  • Disclosure complies with SEBI InvIT Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Roadstar Infra Investment Trust | Category: Rating

item.title: [FSL] Firstsource Solutions: Jagriti Bhattacharyya resigns as EVP & General Counsel
item.description:
Firstsource Solutions Ltd announced the resignation of Ms. Jagriti Bhattacharyya from her position as Executive Vice President - General Counsel and Senior Management Personnel. The company informed this development via a letter dated April 28, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Ms. Bhattacharyya's cessation from the role will be effective June 30, 2026.

  • Jagriti Bhattacharyya resigned from Firstsource Solutions Ltd.
  • She served as Executive Vice President - General Counsel.
  • Her resignation is effective from June 30, 2026.
  • The company disclosed this as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FIRSTSOURCE SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AVG] AVG Logistics Board to meet May 4 for ₹53 Cr Rights Issue terms
item.description:
AVG Logistics Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 4, 2026. The primary agenda is to consider and approve various terms and conditions related to the previously approved Rights Issue. This includes determining the Issue price, Rights Entitlement ratio, and the Record Date. The company had approved the offer and issuance of fully paid-up equity shares via a Rights Issue for an amount not exceeding ₹5,300 Lakhs (₹53 crore) at its board meeting on April 28, 2026, subject to regulatory approvals.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 4, 2026.
  • Meeting to finalize terms for the Rights Issue.
  • Rights Issue approved for up to ₹53 crore.
  • Key terms like issue price and record date to be decided.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVG Logistics Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
